plantRecord.name: Paphiopedilum rothschildianum 'Columbus Gold'

awards.award: Best in Show, Central Ohio Orchid Festival 2025

culture.light: Bright shade, about 1200 fc, east bench.
culture.feed: Quarter-strength balanced feed, weakly weekly in growth.

history.event: Best in Show; photographed for the newsletter cover.
Repotted, no division, kept as specimen.
Midwest Regional entry submitted; anchor plant for the chapter.

plantRecord.notes: The pride of the collection. Slow to mature, took six years to a show-worthy specimen. Stake the dorsal early and let it set flat. Do not divide; specimen value is in the multi-growth.
